# Sample Tool

## Overview

A fixture entity that stands in for a tool which records [[Provenance]]. It exists
only to exercise the entity-shape checks and the source-traceability invariant —
without an entity citing the source, the source would be flagged as orphaned.

## Key Facts

- Fixture entity grounded in [[Provenance Primer]].
- Minimal content; not a reference example for real tooling.

## Related

See [[Provenance]] for the concept this tool illustrates.
